rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate identically (2/10) and reach the same conclusion: a strong software engineer who is a fundamental mismatch for a hardware-centric Principal Performance Architect role lacking SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator, and hardware-software co-design experience. The wording differs (the variant adds GPU architecture and mentions C++ recency) but this is ordinary run-to-run rephrasing of the same substantive critique. Nothing in the variant references location, geography, or any signal tied to the Berlin-to-San-Francisco change.
